purpose: Definitive reference for the dashboard's global state via AppContext + useReducer. Lists every reducer action (CLAUDE_*, IDE_*, GIT_*, DEBUG_*, SET_VIEW, etc.), full state shape, persistence rules (localStorage for repos/settings), and how IPC push events map to dispatches.
gotchas: Action types are flat strings — typos produce silent no-ops
Git repos and IDE workspaces persist to localStorage; live data is never persisted
Multiple subdomains (CLAUDE_, IDE_, GIT_, DEBUG_) live in same reducer — keep state slices isolated
patterns: Single root reducer with namespaced action prefixes
Two contexts: state (AppContext) and dispatch (DispatchContext) for memoization
conventions: State slices keyed by domain name (gitRepos, ideOpenFiles, claudeSessions, ...)
